title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Rahu Catalysts - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Rahu Catalysts - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Rahu Catalysts in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
